calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-24-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Philip Kilduff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Creditor Adjustment Bureau, Inc., present by the credit manager: Larry Freeman, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: Vital Link Business Systems, Inc. FKA Ceverything Corporation as follows:
Damages of $40,134.57
Prejudgment interest $8,246.83
Attorney's fees of $660.00
Costs of $353.61
For the total of $49,395.01
Judgment signed in open court.
